name: Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix together the sugar, cornstarch, flour, and salt.
2. Gradually blend in the hot water. Bring to boiling over high heat, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat to medium and cook for 8 more minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in a small amount of the hot mixture into the egg yolks. Return to the hot mixture.
5. Bring back to a boil over high heat, stirring constantly. Reduce heat to low and cook for 4 more minutes.
6. Remove from heat and add lemon peel and butter. Stir in the lemon juice until well combined.
7. Cover the entire surface with clear plastic wrap and cool for 10 minutes.
8. Pour into the cooled pastry shell and cool to room temperature (about 1 hour).
9. For the meringue, beat egg whites with 1 teaspoon lemon juice until soft peaks form. Gradually add 6 tablespoons sugar, beating until stiff peaks form and sugar is dissolved.
10. Spread meringue over the filling, sealing to the edges of the pastry.
11. Bake in a moderate oven (350F) for 12 to 15 minutes or until the meringue is golden brown.
12. Cool thoroughly before serving.
